base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of gleeok_multi_head_bob — a character (boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. Gleeok — hydra dragon with 2/3/4 heads (scales with dungeon level). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Gleeok — hydra dragon with 2/3/4 heads (scales with dungeon level); 4-frame neck-wave of snake-heads. Heads detach on defeat and continue flying around shooting fireballs. Boss of Levels 4/7
